name: Shield of Faith
description: A shimmering field appears and surrounds a creature of your choice within range, granting it a +2 bonus to AC for the duration.
effect: +2 AC to one creature within range for 10 minutes (concentration)
notes: Cast as bonus action — allows attacking same turn
Range fixed from stub (12 grid cells was wrong; D&D 5e = 60 ft = 4 grid cells)
Concentration for 10 minutes — good sustained defensive buff for a frontliner
